headline: myappai exists to turn intent into controlled execution
subheadline: The product is built as an AI system manager for operators who want the public funnel, admin console, content system, and deployment flow to feel like one coherent platform.

sections.title: Why the redesign matters
sections.description: A premium operator product should not feel like a pile of unrelated experiments. The new experience is built to feel deliberate, fast, and commercially useful.

sections.title: How the business works
sections.description: Software creates the fast recurring lane, Launch Sprint creates guided implementation revenue, and Enterprise Deployment creates the higher-trust rollout lane.

sections.title: What makes it credible
sections.description: The site shows live offer routing, payment readiness, admin visibility, and deployment context instead of relying on decorative claims.

cta.heading: Explore the platform and pricing to see how the commercial and operational layers connect.
cta.body: The strongest story comes from the fact that the same system manages the public site, admin commands, and deploy path.
